_comment: Conformance fixture 30 — cascade conflict resolution test (SPEC #30). Display recipe `cinematic_fullscreen` sets chrome=none. Delivery recipe `full_immersion` sets chrome=minimal. Per the locked cascade order (defaults → display → delivery, last wins), delivery must win → resolved chrome=minimal. The companion fixture to 11-cascade-display-and-delivery, which had no conflict.
name: Cascade Conflict — Delivery Wins Conformance Fixture
